# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-18

SpaceX is acquiring Anysphere (the company behind Cursor AI coding assistant) for $60 billion.

Went through 20 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. SpaceX to buy Cursor (Anysphere) for $60B
   Directly affects anyone using Cursor for AI-assisted coding.

2. Stop Using JWTs
   Directly relevant to auth decisions in CalenCall and ContractorVerify.

3. A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
   Active attack pattern targeting developers via LinkedIn; directly actionable security awareness.

4. Running local models is good now
   Directly relevant to Ollama usage decisions and when to use local vs. API models.

5. Google Chrome's next update will mark the end of popular ad blockers
   Affects developer tooling and privacy workflows for anyone using Chrome.
